elements.content: The blue lead lines must stay with the first fragment of the long paragraph. They must not be stranded at the foot of page 1.
Setup paragraph. This consumes just enough height that the kept chain must negotiate a split rather than fitting whole.
Lead line. This sentence must stay attached to the first fragment below.
Bridge line. This one also belongs to the same kept formation.

Long paragraph. The first fragment should remain on page one with the kept lead lines, while the continuation opens cleanly on page two. Long paragraph.
